description: A tenant with a disability requests to install grab bars in the bathroom as a reasonable accommodation under the Fair Housing Act.

nodes.task_description: Receive the tenant's request and verify their disability-related need if it is not apparent.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the request and understands its basis.

nodes.task_description: Review the request to ensure it is reasonable and does not pose an undue financial or administrative burden.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the request is reasonable.

nodes.task_description: Approve the request and allow the tenant to install the grab bars at their own expense, potentially requiring them to restore the wall upon move-out.

expected_outcome.value: The accommodation is approved in compliance with fair housing laws.
